project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 370
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---

```

## Line Items

| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |

|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |

```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to remaining invoice file
